text: There is an acute sense of modernity and emptiness as I pass through these spaces—each room with its clean lines and subdued lighting hints at both possibility and isolation. When standing before the vibrant R+D exhibit, curiosity stirs within me. I feel simultaneously small within the vastness of innovation, yet inspired by how thought and technology intertwine. Uncertainty and intrigue coalesce, leaving me thoughtful and slightly disoriented in this environment shaped by human creativity and ambition.
